name: Ship It Maybe
author: Huixin Yang
description: A casual tech podcast about cloud, software engineering, AI tooling, and building products as independent developers.

episodes.title: Pilot: Why We Started This Podcast
episodes.summary: A short pilot episode introducing the hosts and the themes of the podcast.

episodes.title: AWS, Frontend, and Shipping Side Projects
episodes.summary: A conversation about cloud architecture, frontend development, and the messy middle of shipping real projects.
